summary: Tested 4 new features: CRM Pagination, Admin Data Management, Finance PDF/Receipt, QR Attendance. All features mostly working. One backend security issue found: DELETE /api/admin/data accepts any payload without confirming the 'DELETE ALL' text on the server side.

critical.issue: No server-side confirmation validation. Accepts any JSON body (or even wrong confirm text) and deletes ALL data. Only frontend enforces 'DELETE ALL' typed confirmation. A malicious or direct API call bypasses this safety check.

action_items: Fix DELETE /api/admin/data to validate request body: require JSON with {confirm: 'DELETE ALL'} and return 400 if it doesn't match. Add Pydantic model with validator.
Update test_credentials.md: student@edutech.com password was stale; reset to student123 via admin API during this test run.
critical_code_review_comments: DELETE /api/admin/data (server.py ~line 1682) does not accept or validate a confirm field - the entire safety mechanism is frontend-only. Add: `class DeleteConfirm(BaseModel): confirm: str` and check `if data.confirm != 'DELETE ALL': raise HTTPException(400, 'Type DELETE ALL to confirm')`

success_rate.backend: 92% (11/12 pass; 1 failure: DELETE data no server-side confirm; 4 skipped initially due to no invoice seed data - manually created invoice, PDF 200 OK confirmed via curl)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 4 features visible and working in UI)

test_credentials: admin@edutech.com/admin123 OK. student@edutech.com password was stale - reset to student123 via PUT /api/users/{id} admin API call.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test invoice via POST /api/finance/calculate (student_name='TEST Student', course='HSC Science', base_fee=25000). Also made payment to test receipt endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features verified working. Only outstanding issue is backend DELETE /api/admin/data lacks server-side confirmation validation. Finance PDF/Receipt APIs confirmed via curl (200 OK, content-type: application/pdf). Student portal QR Check-in tab is visible. AttendanceScan page shows login prompt for unauthenticated and role error for non-student. Teacher attendance 'Show QR' button appears after selecting a session. student@edutech.com password is now student123 (reset during this test run).
rca_of_issue: DELETE /api/admin/data handler at line 1682 in server.py has no body parameter at all - it just deletes everything on any authenticated admin DELETE request. Frontend enforces 'DELETE ALL' text but API is unprotected from direct calls. Fix: add Pydantic model `class DeleteConfirmBody(BaseModel): confirm: str` as request body, validate `confirm == 'DELETE ALL'`.
